thinking.text:
The script is working correctly. It detects takeoff at frame 55 (when the athlete's feet first leave the ground) and landing at frame 61 (when the athlete's feet return to the ground). The output format matches exactly what was requested:

```toml
jump_takeoff_frame_number = 55
jump_land_frame_number = 61
```

The script uses:
1. Frame-to-frame difference to detect motion
2. Tracks the bottom-most point of motion (feet position)
3. Computes ground level from early running frames
4. Finds takeoff when feet first rise above ground level
5. Finds landing when feet return to ground level

This should work for other test videos as well since it dynamically computes the ground level and adapts to different videos.
